Fivetran uses usage-based pricing with tiered cost curves. Pricing varies by product (Connections, Transformations, Activations). Connections have a $5 base charge for usage between 1 MAR and 1M MAR on Standard plan. All new connections include 14-day free trial. Transformations offer 5,000 free monthly model runs on all plans. Activations pricing based on MAR with separate cost curves. Annual contracts provide automatic discounts starting at 5% up to 22%. Enterprise License Agreements available with fixed annual pricing and no consumption limits. Professional services available separately.
